stores.name: Gainz and Shreds Meal Prep Sunnyvale

items.name: Acai Berry Smoothie
items.description: Elevate your day with our Acai Berry Smoothie—a nutrient-packed blend of tropical flavors and functional benefits. Infused with 500% of your daily vitamin C and chicory root fiber, this smoothie supports immunity, promotes digestion, and fuels your wellness with every sip.

items.name: Avocado Greens Smoothie
items.description: Savor our satiating Avocado Greens Smoothie! Crafted from nutrient-dense greens like spinach, kale, and spirulina, it's enhanced with avocado, banana, and matcha for a balanced boost to your wellness routine.

items.name: Celery Juice
items.description: Simplify your sip with our crisp Celery Juice, finished with a splash of zesty lemon. Made with just two ingredients, this refreshing blend supports hydration, gut health, and everyday wellness.

items.name: Chocolate Almond Milk
items.description: Indulge in the creamy richness of our dairy-free Chocolate Almond Milk, crafted with almonds, dates, cocoa, + a touch of sea salt. Sweet, smooth, and perfectly balanced, this blend satisfies your sweet cravings while nourishing your body.

items.name: Chocolate Banana Protein Smoothie
items.description: Fuel your body, treat your taste buds. Our Chocolate Banana Protein Smoothie delivers 20g of plant protein with banana, cocoa, almond butter, and cinnamon for smooth satisfaction. Perfect for powering workouts, mornings, or mid-day cravings. *This product has been reformulated to include coconut cream for a smoother, creamier finish.

items.name: Daily Citrus 1: Cucumber With Coconut Water
items.description: Light, revitalizing, and refreshingly sweet—Daily Citrus 1 is a crisp fusion of cucumber, pineapple, coconut, lemon, and aloe vera. Bursting with wholesome goodness, this blend delivers balanced hydration in every sip.

items.name: Daily Citrus 2: Pineapple Mint Juice
items.description: Rejuvenate with Daily Citrus 2—a crisp, refreshing blend of apple, pineapple, lemon, and mint. This vibrant juice helps hydrate and uplift, delivering a bright burst of feel-good flavor in every sip.

items.name: Daily Greens 1.5: Cucumber Lemon Juice With Sea Salt
items.description: Rejuvenate your body with our hydrating Daily Greens 1.5 Juice. This refreshing blend of cucumber, celery, lemon, spinach, kale, parsley, and a pinch of sea salt delivers essential minerals to support your wellness and keep you feeling balanced and revitalized.

items.name: Daily Greens 1: Cucumber Lemon Juice
items.description: Crafted from a vibrant blend of cucumber, celery, spinach, lemon, kale, and parsley, Daily Greens 1 delivers essential vitamins and minerals to help refresh your body and support daily wellness.

items.name: Daily Greens 2: Sweet Apple Juice
items.description: Recharge with Daily Greens 2—a vibrant blend of cold-pressed apple, spinach, kale, celery, cucumber, and parsley. This refreshing mix of sweet fruit and leafy greens delivers wholesome green goodness to help fuel your day.

items.name: Daily Greens 3: Ginger Juice
items.description: Refresh with Daily Greens 3—a vibrant blend of apple, cucumber, celery, lemon, spinach, ginger, kale, and parsley. This invigorating mix delivers a balanced blend of leafy greens and a zesty ginger kick to help support your daily wellness goals.

items.name: Daily Greens 4: Spicy Ginger Juice
items.description: Indulge in Daily Greens 4—a revitalizing blend of cucumber, celery, spinach, lemon, ginger, and a kick of cayenne. This leafy green–powered juice supports your wellness routine with a refreshing finish and zesty twist.

items.name: Daily Roots 2: Sweet Apple Juice
items.description: Delight in Daily Roots 2—a harmonious blend of apple, butternut squash, carrot, beet, spinach, lemon, parsley, ginger, and kale. This earthy, refreshing juice offers a grounding flavor and supports daily wellness with every sip.

items.name: Daily Roots 3: Ginger Juice
items.description: Revitalize with Daily Roots 3—a dynamic fusion of sweet and spicy. Crisp apple, tangy lemon, and zesty ginger meet the earthy depth of beet for a bold, flavorful blend in every sip.

items.name: Dark Chocolate Protein Smoothie
items.description: Indulge in the rich taste of our Dark Chocolate Protein Smoothie, packed with 30g of pea protein isolate and enriched with prebiotic fiber. It’s the ultimate fuel for workouts, a hearty breakfast, or a satisfying on-the-go meal.

items.name: Debloat Shot
items.description: Support your digestive wellness with our feel-good Debloat Shot. Packed with gut-friendly live probiotics, this refreshing 2oz sip is designed to help ease bloat + promote overall digestive well-being.

items.name: Debloat Tonic
items.description: Experience our Debloat Tonic, formulated with probiotics, peppermint, lemon balm, and fennel seed to support bloat relief. Infused with pineapple and lemon, this refreshing blend promotes digestive wellness in every sip.

items.name: Ginger Lemon Cayenne Wellness Shot
items.description: Fire up your wellness with our boldest shot yet. This 2oz blend of ginger, lemon, and cayenne packs a zesty punch in every sip. Formulated to help you detox and reset, it’s a quick, invigorating way to support a healthy inflammatory response and awaken your senses with a kick of spice.

items.name: Gut Biome+ Shot
items.description: Formulated for total gut support, Gut Biome+ is your daily shot for digestion, triple action detox, microbiome balance and cellular health. Featuring broccoli seed extract with glucoraphanin, green superfoods, prebiotic fiber + live probiotics, this blend assists your body’s natural detox rhythm to help support overall wellness, nutrient absorption, and balance starting from the gut.

items.name: Immunity Shot
items.description: Elevate your daily immunity with our potent Immunity Shot! Packed with live probiotics, zinc, + nourishing ingredients, this powerful blend delivers 240% of your daily vitamin C for enhanced immune and overall wellness support.

items.name: Immunity Tonic: Ginger Turmeric
items.description: Sip your way to immunity support with our Ginger Turmeric Immunity Tonic. Packed with 440% daily vitamin C, 100% daily zinc, and live probiotics, this refreshing tonic helps support your body’s immune system.

items.name: Multivitamin + Gut Health Shot
items.description: Elevate your daily wellness routine with our Multivitamin + Gut Health Shot, crafted from a refreshing blend of pineapple + carrot juice. With 100% DV of vitamins A, C, E, and B12, plus probiotics, it’s your all-in-one nutrient boost on the go.

items.name: Probiotic Shot
items.description: Support your gut, one shot at a time. Our Probiotic Shot blends crisp apple and zesty ginger with 2 billion CFUs of live cultures to aid digestion and promote balance from within—all in a convenient 2oz sip.

items.name: Simple Cleanse® Juice
items.description: Elevate your day with our Simple Cleanse®—a zesty blend of lemon, ginger, and cayenne. This refreshing juice is crafted to support your system and promote a gentle gut cleanse for everyday balance.

items.name: Strawberry Basil Probiotic Lemonade
items.description: Revitalize your routine with our Strawberry Basil Probiotic Lemonade, a refreshing blend with aromatic basil. With probiotics, prebiotic fiber, + 100% of your daily vitamin C, it’s a delicious way to nourish your body, support digestion, + boost immunity.

items.name: Strawberry Orange Mango Smoothie
items.description: Refresh with our Strawberry Orange Mango Smoothie, a vibrant blend packed with 500% of your daily vitamin C, 14% of your daily fiber, and 15% of your daily potassium. Crafted to nourish, each sip nurtures immunity, supports digestion, and fuels your body with essential nutrients.

items.name: Tropical Wellness Smoothie
items.description: Sip your way to paradise with our Tropical Wellness Smoothie—a vibrant blend of mangoes, bananas, and pineapple. Packed with 510% vitamin C + digestive-boosting chicory root fiber, this smoothie supports immunity, digestion, and overall vitality in every refreshing sip.

items.name: Turmeric Glow Shot
items.description: Brighten your wellness routine with the Turmeric Glow Shot. Created with Miranda Kerr’s KORA Organics, this turmeric-rich blend supports daily wellness and promotes a radiant glow from within.

items.name: Unwind Shot
items.description: Find your inner zen with our Unwind Shot, a soothing blend of ashwagandha, green tea extract, + tart cherry. With 20% of your daily magnesium, this refreshing sip is designed to promote relaxation and balance for both mind and body.

items.name: Unwind Tonic
items.description: Find your stillness. Our Unwind Tonic is a calming elixir of tart cherry, chamomile, magnesium, ashwagandha, and L-theanine—each chosen to support your body’s natural rhythms and restore inner peace. Sip slowly, breathe deeply, and return to yourself.

items.name: Vanilla Almond Milk
items.description: Savor the creamy richness of our dairy-free Vanilla Almond Milk, crafted with almonds, dates, vanilla extract, and a pinch of sea salt. Sweet, smooth, and perfectly balanced, this blend satisfies your cravings while supporting your wellness goals.

items.name: Vanilla Protein Smoothie
items.description: Elevate your routine with our Vanilla Protein Smoothie, now upgraded to 30g of plant protein. Made with coconut milk, pea protein, and almond butter, plus prebiotic fiber—it’s rich, creamy, and ultra-filling. Perfect pre/post-workout, as a hearty breakfast, or a meal replacement on the go.

items.name: BUTTER CHICKEN SUB
items.description: Creamy butter chicken in a toasted sub with lettuce, onions, and mint chutney—rich, fresh, and satisfying.

items.name: CHICKEN MAKHANI BOWL
items.description: Rich, buttery, tender boneless chicken simmered in a creamy tomato-butter sauce, mildly spiced and perfectly balanced. Served over yellow basmati rice topped with tangy pickled red onions and fresh cilantro, finished with cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney.

items.name: CHICKPEA CRUNCH SALAD
items.description: Fresh spring mix topped with curry-spiced chickpeas, steamed beetroot, creamy avocado, cherry tomatoes, broccoli, and shredded carrots, finished with crunchy almonds, house-made mango dressing, and a drizzle of cilantro mint chutney

items.name: DAAL BUKHARA BOWL
items.description: Creamy, slow-cooked black lentils simmered for deep, smoky richness. Made with whole urad dal, butter, and gentle spices, served over yellow basmati rice and finished with fresh cilantro, cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney.

items.name: KADAI CHICKEN  SUB
items.description: Kadai Chicken layered in a soft toasted sub with crisp lettuce and fresh onions, finished with a cool, zesty mint chutney.

items.name: KADAI CHICKEN BOWL
items.description: Bold, spicy, chicken loaded with fresh bell peppers and onions served over basmati rice and finished with cilantro and pickled onions, cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney.

items.name: KADAI PANEER BOWL
items.description: Soft paneer cubes sizzling in aromatic kadai spices with vibrant bell peppers and onions. Cooked in a rich, spiced tomato gravy and served over fluffy yellow basmati rice with fresh herbs and tangy pickled onions, cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney.

items.name: KADAI PANEER SUB
items.description: Flavor-packed kadai paneer tossed in bold Indian spices, layered with crisp lettuce and fresh onions in a soft sub, finished with cooling mint chutney for a perfect balance of heat and freshness.

items.name: KADAI SOYAA CHAAP BOWL
items.description: Meaty, flavorful soya chaap cooked in bold kadai spices and onions in a rich masala gravy, served over yellow basmati rice and topped with herbs and pickled onions, cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney

items.name: LENTIL SOUP
items.description: Hearty lentil soup with warm spices—smooth, comforting, and nourishing.

items.name: MANGO RASBHARI
items.description: Soft, delicate milk dumplings soaked in a creamy, mango-infused milk, lightly sweetened and finished with a smooth, rich texture—refreshing, indulgent, and bursting with tropical flavor in every bite.

items.name: MASALA CHICKEN KEEMA BOWL (Ground Chicken)
items.description: Savory (Chicken Keema) ground chicken simmered with onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic, and aromatic Indian spices, served over yellow basmati rice and topped with fresh cilantro, pickled onions, mango and mint chutney. A hearty, protein-packed bowl full of homestyle Punjabi flavor

items.name: PINDI CHANA BOWL
items.description: Slow-cooked, spice-rich Pindi Chana (chickpeas) served over fragrant turmeric rice, topped with tangy pickled red onions and fresh cilantro, finished with cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney for a perfect balance of bold, vibrant flavors

items.name: PUNJABI CHICKEN CURRY RICE BOWL
items.description: Tender chicken simmered in a homestyle Punjabi onion-tomato curry with aromatic spices, served over fragrant yellow basmati rice and topped with pickled onions, fresh cilantro, mint and mango chutney. A hearty bowl packed with authentic North Indian comfort flavors.

items.name: PUNJABI RAJMA RICE BOWL
items.description: Slow-simmered Punjabi kidney beans cooked in a rich tomato-onion masala with aromatic spices, served over fragrant basmati yellow rice finished with fresh cilantro, cool mint chutney and sweet mango chutney.

items.name: ROSE KHEER PUDDING
items.description: Creamy rose-infused rice pudding—smooth, fragrant, and lightly sweet, garnished with almonds and tutti fruity.

items.name: SAAG PANEER BOWL
items.description: Velvety spinach slow-cooked with spices, folded with paneer cubes, served over basmati rice with herbs and pickled onions. Creamy, earthy, and comforting.

items.name: SALMON MASALA SALAD
items.description: Spring mix, roasted salmon, grilled broccoli, pickled onions, purple cabbage, cucumber, steamed beetroot, tri color tortilla strips, chipotle chutney and cilantro mint chutney

items.name: SAMOSA SUB
items.description: Crispy, golden samosas tucked into a soft sub roll with fresh lettuce and onions, finished with a generous spread of cool, zesty mint chutney—crunchy, tangy, and packed with bold flavor in every bite

items.name: SPICED JACKFRUIT RICE BOWL (Kathal)
items.description: Tender young jackfruit slow-cooked in a flavorful tomato-onion masala and served over fragrant yellow basmati rice. Topped with pickled onions, fresh cilantro, mint chutney and mango chutney. A hearty, plant-based bowl packed with authentic Indian flavor

items.name: TIRAMISU SLICE
items.description: A classic dessert layered with espresso-soaked sponge and rich, creamy mascarpone, finished with a dusting of cocoa for a perfectly smooth bite

items.name: TRES LECHES CAKE SLICE
items.description: Soft sponge cake soaked in three milks and topped with whipped cream—light, creamy, and perfectly sweet.

items.name: Brentwood Chinese Chicken Salad
items.description:
Our take on the not-so-traditional classic: hand-pulled organic chicken, bok choy, snowpeas, green onion, cabbage, avocado, sesame seed, watermelon radish, cilantro, and a side of grain-free “wontons,” toasted quinoa, roasted almonds, and a side of carrot-ginger vinaigrette. 

Gluten-free and dairy-free, choose no chicken to make it plant based

items.name: California Harvest Chopped Salad
items.description:
Our fan-favorite chopped salad, back for another season: gem lettuce mix, falafel crispies, Hook's aged 2-year white cheddar, marinated yellow beets, chopped dates, toasted almonds, and a side of maple mustard vinaigrette.


gluten-free and vegetarian, remove cheese to make it vegan

items.name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
items.description:
Hand-pulled organic roasted chicken, little gem lettuce, garlicky croutons, avocado, parmesan, and tossed with our Caesar dressing in a grain-free tortilla wrap.

gluten-free

items.name: Coco Chocolate Chip Cookies (2 Cookies)
items.description:
Almond flour chocolate chip cookies with toasted coconut flakes (2 per order)

Gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan

items.name: Coco Chocolate Chip Cookies (6 Cookies)
items.description:
Half dozen almond flour chocolate chip cookies with toasted coconut flakes

Gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan

items.name: Curry Chicken Salad Summer Rolls
items.description:
A duo of rice-paper-wrapped curry organic chicken salad with watermelon radish, carrots, sprouts and collard greens, and a side of pineapple-mango chutney

Gluten-free and dairy-free

items.name: Dark Chocolate & Sea Salt  Brownie
items.description:
Dark chocolate, cacao, almond flour, and sea salt

gluten-free and dairy-free

items.name: Everyday Kale and Brussels Salad
items.description:
A smaller version of our kale and brussels salad. Finely shaved kale, brussels sprouts and green cabbage salad, Hook’s 2-year aged white cheddar, and avocado with a side of candied puffed rice and seed mix, and GCC apple cider vinaigrette.

gluten-free and vegetarian, remove cheese to make it vegan

items.name: Everyday Kale and Brussels Salad - Lrg
items.description:
Finely shaved kale, brussels sprouts and green cabbage salad, Hook’s 2-year aged white cheddar, and avocado with a side of candied puffed rice and seed mix, and apple cider vinaigrette.

gluten-free and vegetarian, choose no cheese to make it reset friendly

items.name: Falaf-OH Hummus Wrap
items.description:
Crispy golden falafel, pickled red onions, hummus, kale and brussels sprout slaw, pepperoncini, and herby aioli, served in a grain-free tortilla wrap.

gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan

items.name: G-Potle Taco Crunch Bowl
items.description:
We gave the typical taco bowl a makeover. Little gem lettuce, chipotle marinated chicken, adobo black beans, avocado, pico de gallo, quickly pickled red cabbage and cilantro, Hook's 2 year aged white cheddar cheese, topped with crispy rice and casavva flour tortilla crunchies, and served with a side of creamy salsa verde.

gluten-free, choose mushroom carnitas and no cheese to make it vegan

items.name: GP's Classic-ish Cobb
items.description:
Gwyneth put together her favorite salad, and here it is: 7-minute egg, avocado, tomatoes, Point Reyes blue cheese, roasted golden beets, pickled shishitos, maple glazed bacon, little gem, radicchio, and a side of Dijon mustard vinaigrette.

Gluten-free; remove bacon to make it vegetarian

items.name: GP's Soccata (a blend of chickpeas, kale, and feta, roasted and pan-seared)
Huberman's Organic Turkey Chili
items.description:
Dr. Huberman developed, taste-tested, and approved the ultimate protein-packed meal: a nutrient-dense chili made with organic turkey, fiber-rich kidney beans, and a blend of five chiles. Build your perfect bowl by mixing and matching six garnishes, Japanese sweet potato, pickled cabbage, lime crema, Hook’s 2-year aged cheddar, pickled jalapeños, and fresh cilantro.

gluten-free

items.name: Little Gem Caesar Salad
items.description:
Our spin on a classic Caesar salad. Red and green gem lettuce, parmesan, and parmesan croutons, with a side dressing of your choice. (Chef's tip: add a little heat with the spicy calabrian caesar dressing)

gluten-free and vegetarian

items.name: Little Gem Caesar Salad
items.description:
Our spin on a classic Caesar salad. Red and green gem lettuce, parmesan, and parmesan croutons, with a side dressing of your choice. (Chef's tip: add a little heat with the spicy calabrian caesar dressing)

gluten-free and vegetarian

items.name: Mediterranean Hummus Bowl
items.description:
A light and refreshing greens and grains bowl. Your choice of organic chicken, or GP's soccata, hummus, a blend of kale, brussels sprouts and cabbage with our quinoa and brown rice mix, cucumber, olive and tomato salad with pickled onions, feta, pepperoncini, and a side of greek goddess dressing.

gluten-free, choose GP's soccata to make it vegetarian

items.name: Miso Salmon Bento Box
items.description:
Rooted in tradition, reimagined with a goop twist. Teriyaki glazed salmon, organic brown rice, pickled ginger and wasabi, 7-minute egg, furikake, edamame and cucumber salad, cabbage and bok choy slaw with carrot ginger vinaigrette, toasted sesame seeds, and a side of teriyaki and miso honey vinaigrette.

gluten-free, dairy-free, choose tofu to make it vegetarian

items.name: NYC Chicken Salad Wrap
items.description:
Our riff on the traditional Waldorf salad includes roasted chicken, apples, dates, grapes, crunchy nuts, kale slaw, and gem lettuce in a cassava flour wrap.

gluten-free, dairy-free, and contains nuts

items.name: Summer Blackened Salmon Bowl
items.description:
Pan-seared salmon seasoned with our blackening spices, organic brown rice and quinoa blend, arugula and spinach salad, and topped with cucumber and snap peas that comes pre-tossed with our green goddess dressing and everything bagel seasoning, roasted cherry tomatoes, pickled onions, and avocado, served with a side of our lemon pesto vinaigrette. 

gluten-free and dairy-free

items.name: Summer Salad Rolls
items.description:
These rolls are what you have been craving, but didn’t know you needed. Sweet and spicy BBQ glazed tofu, crunchy slaw (zucchini, cabbage, romaine, carrots, snow peas, mint, cilantro and basil), avocado and marinated glass noodles served with a side dipping sauce of our cashew vinaigrette and shallot-garlic chili crunch oil

*This dish contains nuts and cannot be removed*

items.name: Teriyaki Salmon Hand Rolls
items.description:
Inspired by tradition, elevated for today. Marinated teriyaki salmon, collard greens, ginger-scallion noodles, avocado, cucumber, cilantro leaves wrapped in rice paper, and served with a side of our teriyaki sauce and spicy aioli.

gluten-free, and dairy-free

items.name: Thai Crispy Rice Crunch Salad
items.description:
Hand-pulled chicken, or bbq tofu, marinated noodles, shaved slaw, cucumbers, sweet carrots, fresh cilantro and mint, crispy rice and cashew blend, and a side of cashew vinaigrette.  

gluten-free and dairy-free, choose BBQ tofu to make it vegetarian

items.name: The BEST Arugula Salad
items.description:
Light and refreshing. Arugula and butter lettuce hearts, watermelon radish, parmesan, crispy shallots and capers, and a side of lemon vinaigrette.

gluten-free and vegetarian, choose no parmesan and make it vegan

items.name: The BEST Arugula Salad - Lrg
items.description:
It’s just a really good salad. Arugula and butter lettuce hearts, watermelon radish, parmesan, crispy shallots and capers, and a side of lemon vinaigrette.

gluten-free and vegetarian

items.name: The goop Father Italian Chopped Salad
items.description:
A little old-world charm, a lot of fresh flavors! Little gem lettuce, kale and red leaf lettuce blend, green olives, pepperoncini, mozzarella, shaved parmesan, tomato spiced chickpeas, artichoke salad, nitrate-free salami, marinated tomatoes, with a side of creamy Italian vinaigrette, and gluten-free parmesan croutons.

gluten-free, remove salami to make it vegetarian

items.name: The Goop Teriyaki Bowl
items.description:
Grilled organic chicken, umami rice blend (shiitake and brown rice), sesame marinated kale, avocado, house-made furikake, garlic broccoli, Gyocha's pickled ginger, and a side of teriyaki sauce

gluten-free, and dairy-free, choose BBQ-glazed tofu to make it vegetarian

items.name: The Greenest Green Salad
items.description:
What more can we say? This salad is ready to party. Romaine and little gem lettuce blend, cucumbers, avocado, green beans, grilled artichoke salad, snow peas, and pesto marinated chickpeas, served with a side of superseed crunchies (sesame seeds, poppy seeds, almond flour, everything seasoning) and lemon vinaigrette

Gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegan

items.name: The Montecito Turkey Wrap
items.description:
A California-inspired turkey and avo wrap. Organic roasted turkey, avocado, shaved kale slaw, Hook’s 2-yr aged cheddar, served in a flour wrap, and your choice of side dressing.


gluten-free, choose no cheese to make it dairy-free

items.name: Your Favorite Summer Salad
items.description:
Summer seasonal lettuce blend, pesto marinated chickpeas, roasted cherry tomatoes, persian cucumbers, basil, parmesan, and a side of our parmesan croutons and creamy Italian vinaigrette.

gluten-free, choose no parmesan, and no croutons to make it vegan

items.name: Your Favorite Summer Salad - LRG
items.description:
Summer seasonal lettuce blend, pesto marinated chickpeas, roasted cherry tomatoes, persian cucumbers, basil, parmesan, and a side of our parmesan croutons and creamy Italian vinaigrette.

items.name: (V) Organic Tofu 50-50 Bowl
items.description:
Balanced vegan option. Heft from purple rice, lightness from mixed greens, served with organic tofu, cucumbers, shredded carrots, seasonal snow or snap peas, fresh pear slices, cashews, and fresh cilantro and scallion. Finished with your choice of Lotus & Lime signature sauce — bright Ginger Lime, rich "Peanut" Sauce (nut-free, made with roasted sunflower), or savory Tamarind Garlic.

Everything is gluten, dairy free, and peanut free including all sauces. Remove cashews to make it nut free.
